title: Digimobs Beyond
description: This is a modpack for the digimobs beyond minecraft server
body:
Digimobs Beyond is a mod pack for The Digimobs Beyond Server.

The Goal of the pack is to Collect and battle digimon along with other players on a server or alone in a single player world Collect Digimon Battle with them to level up and eventualy Evolve into Stronger Forms Feel free to join our Discord 
Discord link
https://discord.gg/D6nggpH9tZ

please always use the Latest version of digimobs
https://modrinth.com/mod/digimobs
